notes.body: The light is made active: it loosens from the clouds and reveals without fully explaining.
An unnamed traveler keeps the passage suspended between folktale and private memory.
More than an abandoned house: a once-inhabited place visibly overtaken by neglect.
Reeds bring the wet, marginal landscape close to the human threshold.
A small domestic light makes the empty residence feel inhabited before anyone appears.
The pause at the threshold is both physical and moral: entering means accepting the invitation of the scene.
A curtained screen used in aristocratic interiors; here it divides visibility from presence.
The passage ends on perception without proof, the characteristic pressure of something nearly seen.
